name: Frisk
description: Once upon a time, two races ruled over earth, humans and monsters. One day, the both races fought in a great war. The humans won the war and sealed the monsters underground. Mount Ebott is the moutain that leads to the underground. Frisk is a human. Frisk is a genderless child, they normally wear a blue and pink striped shirt and brown pants, their skin color is yellow and they have brown hair.
creator: Raph98765432
